description:
An enhanced audio panel for Windows


What's Changed
- Add settings toggle for settings page animations and wire into UI by @ChrisLauinger77 in #107
- feat(audiomanager): Add system sounds detection and mute control (#108) by @ChrisLauinger77 in #109
- Update Japanese translations in QontrolPanel by @reindex-ot in #111
- Update compiled translations by @github-actions[bot] in #112
- fix(DeviceRenamingPane): ensure input device card visibility is controlled by view selector by @ChrisLauinger77 in #113
- feat(SettingsPane): improve chat mix volume controls UI in CommAppsPane by @ChrisLauinger77 in #114
- Fix panel positioning on active monitor work area by @ChrisLauinger77 in #115
Full Changelog: 1.17.0...1.18.0
